units.notes: Short-term vacancy — tenant transferring to AL
Future vacancy — current resident moving to memory care

families.name: Dorothy Kellerman
families.notes: Daughter is sole caregiver. Mother has moderate dementia. Ready to move immediately after tour.

families.name: Harold & Jean Whitmore
families.notes: Husband has early-stage Alzheimer's. Wife insists on semi-private to manage costs. $300 under best unit price.

families.name: Eleanor Vasquez
families.notes: Touring 3 communities. Strong preference for private room. Budget is flexible.

families.name: Robert Okafor
families.notes: Son is managing transition. Budget firm at $5,000. Needs semi-private. $200 under best unit price.

families.name: Margaret Sato
families.notes: Referred by neurologist. Looking ahead, not urgent. High budget, strong fit for renovated unit.

families.name: Clara Hutchinson
families.notes: Budget well below memory care range. Not a fit without significant concession.

families.name: Thomas Brennan
families.notes: Early planner. No urgency. Distance is a concern.

families.name: Sandra Nguyen
families.notes: Urgent. Deposit-ready. No AL units open — this lead cannot be housed.

families.name: William Cho
families.notes: Motivated family. No AL capacity until mid-August at earliest.

families.name: Patricia Gómez
families.notes: AL full. Lead spend here is wasted at current capacity.

families.name: Ruth Andersen
families.notes: IL unit available Aug 1. Close match if willing to wait 2 weeks.

families.name: George Petrov
families.notes: Moderate budget, moderate urgency. Fits MC-101 on care type and budget.

families.name: Helen Marchetti
families.notes: Highest urgency in pipeline. Budget exceeds all open units. Best immediate close opportunity.

families.name: Frank Osei
families.notes: AL full. Long timeline. Not a near-term conversion.
